title: Gen3C Checkpoint Download & Conversion

activities.label: parse_args()
activities.description: Parse CLI args: --checkpoint_dir (default='checkpoints'). Returns args namespace.

activities.label: main(): Initialize
activities.description: Set ORG_NAME='nvidia', extra_models list, create checkpoints_dir (Path), define download_kwargs with allowed file patterns.

activities.label: get_md5_checksum(checkpoints_dir, 'Gen3C-Cosmos-7B')
activities.description: Verify MD5 for Gen3C-Cosmos-7B/model.pt against lookup table. Returns True if valid, False if missing/mismatch.

activities.label: snapshot_download('nvidia/Gen3C-Cosmos-7B', ...)
activities.description: Download Gen3C-Cosmos-7B from HuggingFace to local_dir with allowed patterns: README.md, model.pt, mean_std.pt, image_mean_std.pt, config.json, *.jit, guardrail/*.

activities.label: get_md5_checksum(checkpoints_dir, model_name)
activities.description: Verify MD5 for extra model files. google-t5/t5-11b checks pytorch_model.bin and tf_model.h5.

activities.label: snapshot_download(repo_id, local_dir, ...)
activities.description: Download all files for the extra model (no allow_patterns filter — full repo download).

convert_pixtral_checkpoint_flow: Check if save_path (checkpoint_dir/checkpoint_name/model.pt) already exists and non-empty → if so, return early
Split ckpt keys into: vit_ckpt (prefix 'vision_encoder.'), projector_ckpt (prefix 'vision_language_adapter.'), llm_ckpt (remainder)
Remap projector keys: w_in. → projector.0., w_out. → projector.2.
Load params.json, extract vision_encoder_config dict (dim, num_channels, image_size, patch_size, etc.)
Assert vision_encoder_config matches expected 400M ViT config (dim=1024, patch_size=16, n_layers=24, n_heads=16, etc.)
Build llm_config from pixtral_config keys; map hidden_dim → ffn_hidden_size; embed vision_encoder type string
get_md5_checksum_flow: Filter MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP keys by prefix model_name + '/'
If no expected files: check if model_dir exists and is non-empty → return True/False
For each matching key: verify file exists on disk; compute hashlib.md5; compare to lookup value
Return False on first mismatch or missing file; return True if all pass

decision_points.condition: get_md5_checksum returns True for extra model
No expected files in MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP for model
decision_points.false_branch: Iterate and verify MD5 for each expected file

key_data.checkpoint_format: torch .pt with keys: model, mm_projector, vision_encoder

external_dependencies: huggingface_hub.snapshot_download — download model repos from HF Hub
torch.save / torch.set_default_dtype — save converted checkpoint, manage dtype
scripts.download_guardrail_checkpoints.download_guardrail_checkpoints — imported but NOT called in main()
important_notes: convert_pixtral_checkpoint() is defined but never called inside main() — it is a standalone utility. The main() workflow only downloads Gen3C-Cosmos-7B + 2 extra models with MD5 gating. download_guardrail_checkpoints is imported but unused in this script.
